## SECTION 9 — This Day in History (India)
On October 26, 1947, the absolutely massive, historically definitive, and incredibly monumental Instrument of Accession was officially and aggressively signed by Maharaja Hari Singh of Jammu and Kashmir. This incredibly massive legal document instantly triggered the aggressive, massive airlift of the Indian Army into Srinagar, heavily initiating the absolute, unending Indo-Pakistani conflict over the massive Kashmir region.
